rationale: The formal EU accession process launch for Ukraine and Moldova remains the most relevant new development for Poland as a neighboring advocate state; Iran deal incremental progress offers mild energy price relief potential.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Formal EU accession process launched for Ukraine and Moldova — a landmark geopolitical step Poland has strongly advocated for, reinforcing regional stability and Poland's strategic interests.

top_events.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
top_events.summary: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to a ceasefire deal; if realized, could ease global energy prices and reduce inflation pressure on Polish households indirectly.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's public admission of economic and social strain from the war is a continued qualitative signal of Russian weakness — no new battlefield escalation, but relevant context for Poland's eastern security outlook.
